AuditLog.description:
Append-only record of every config-changing action — who, when, what.

Surfaced read-only on the History page (Phase 6). Write endpoints record
entries here via `auth.audit.record_audit`.
AuditLog.title: AuditLog

Candle.description: A single OHLCV bar for one symbol/interval/market.
Candle.title: Candle

Decision.description: A structured trading decision parsed from an LLM response.
Decision.title: Decision

EquitySnapshot.description: A point-in-time snapshot of portfolio equity — powers the equity curve.
EquitySnapshot.title: EquitySnapshot

Position.description:
One strategy's position in one symbol/market — the attribution row.

`qty` is always >= 0; `side` gives the direction. `realized_pnl` and
`fees_paid` accumulate over the position's lifetime (the row is kept after
a position goes flat so cumulative PnL is preserved).
Position.title: Position

Role.description:
Operator role. `admin` has full access; `user` is restricted
(see plan: Authentication & Roles).
Role.title: Role

StrategyRead.description: A strategy's identity, lifecycle state and accounting summary.
StrategyRead.title: StrategyRead

Trade.description:
An executed fill — the transaction-log row, attributed to a strategy.

`realized_pnl` is the PnL booked *by this fill* (0 for opening/adding fills,
non-zero when it reduces or closes a position).
Trade.title: Trade

TradingMode.description: Where orders are routed. Sim is the safe default.
TradingMode.title: TradingMode

WatchdogStatus.description: Engine liveness assessed from the heartbeat and open-position count.
WatchdogStatus.title: WatchdogStatus

post.description: Run a free-form analyze-and-decide task through the configured LLM.

Exchange operator credentials for an access + refresh token pair.

Rate-limited: repeated failures lock the username out (brute-force guard).
Issue a fresh token pair from a valid refresh token.
Replay a strategy over the requested date range and return the result.

get.description: The audit log of config-changing actions, newest-first.

schema.title: Response Audit Api History Audit Get

get.description: The transaction log, newest-first, optionally filtered by date range.

schema.title: Response Trades Api History Trades Get

get.description: The transaction log as a CSV download (oldest-first) for tax/reporting.
Current futures funding rate for a symbol.
Candle history — served from the cache, refreshed from Binance.

schema.title: Response Get Klines Api Market Klines Get

get.description: Latest 24h tickers — from the live snapshot, or REST as a fallback.

schema.title: Response List Tickers Api Market Tickers Get
Response Equity Api Portfolio Equity Get

get.description: Currently open positions across all strategies.

schema.title: Response Positions Api Portfolio Positions Get

get.description: Aggregate accounting — equity, PnL, fees, allocated vs idle capital.

schema.title: Response Trades Api Portfolio Trades Get

get.description: Current trading mode and whether Binance keys are stored.

put.description: Store the Binance API credentials (encrypted at rest).
Switch the trading mode (Sim / Testnet / Live).

get.description: Every registered strategy with its allocation, state and PnL.

schema.title: Response List Strategies Api Strategies Get

patch.description: Set a strategy's capital budget; the engine caps its exposure to it.

post.description: Close every open position held by the strategy.

patch.description: Enable or disable a strategy. Disabling stops new entries only.

get.description: Engine liveness — heartbeat age and whether an alert is warranted.

schema.title: Response List Users Api Users Get

get.description: Liveness probe — used by Docker, CI and the deploy script.
